3317820.name: Planet Finder
3317820.description:
Planet Finder is an engaging game where your sole objective is to wander through the vastness of space in search of new and exciting planets. With each planet you discover, you have the creative freedom to name it whatever you wish, adding a personal touch to your adventure.

 For every planet you uncover, an achievement will be unlocked, rewarding your exploration efforts. The controls are designed to be simple and easy to learn: the A and D keys or the left and right arrow keys will rotate your ship, while the W key or the up arrow will accelerate it, making navigation a breeze.

Currently, the game is in early access, allowing for continuous development, as new features and enhancements may be added based on valuable community feedback. Dive into this stellar journey and let your imagination soar!
